benchmark_analysis.text_layout: 2-line structure: small subtitle top + large keyword bottom, always in lower half
benchmark_analysis.color_tone: dark background, strong contrast, red/yellow accent colors
benchmark_analysis.art_style: photorealistic AI or illustrated — mix acceptable, photorealistic preferred
benchmark_analysis.face_style: natural expression or no face (landscape/object focus)
benchmark_analysis.notes: Thumbnails reference 3 Korean history channels. All use bottom-half text. Dark moody tones dominate. Avoid exaggerated expressions.
